category_sources: source_facts.description identifies chrome-export as a tool for converting Chrome bookmarks and history to HTML bookmark files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides the canonical CLI name chrome-export.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; the README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains an upstream repository value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Chrome bookmarks/history export; source_facts.executables lists export-chrome-bookmarks and export-chrome-history.
